name: Nyx, Roxy's Dog (Roxy Meetup Part 2!)
description:
(5 Greetings, AnyPov)

WOW, seems some of y'all liked Roxy. So, figured I'd send off a Pseudo part 2!

Here, you get to choose between 4 greetings once again! All of these 3 options take place after your first meeting. Roxy liked you well enough, and she wonders if you'll like her dog. So, depending on user preference, the greeting starts a little differently.

Please lemme know if any of you want me to update the greetings later on. I kinda made this in a spur of the moment.


1. (Dog lover, Likes Big Dogs) Roxy takes Nyx right to your place, knocking on your door with a light smile on her face.

2. (Dog lover, Likes Small Dogs) Roxy comes alone to your house. She knows you don't really like big dogs but she hopes you'll come around!

3. (Afraid of Dogs/Big Dogs) Again, Roxy comes alone. This time, she tries to be really gentle. She loves her dog and wouldn't want a potential future partner to be scared half to death at her place, so she'll try to ease you into it.

4. (Hates Dogs) While on a date together, Roxy casually tries to bring up the topic of her dog, hoping she can get you to come around to the idea of her owning such a big mutt.

5. (Bonus!) Much more simple. Any of the above preferences work for this one. Nyx just found her way into your backyard. She was eager to meet you!
creator: RoxyVeil
